allow: Bash(psql -U postgres -d NoiThatMinhQui -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = ''news_category'' ORDER BY ordinal_position;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=123456 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d NoiThatMinhQui -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' ORDER BY table_name;")

Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const prisma = new PrismaClient\(\); prisma.warehouse.findMany\({ take: 3, select: { id: true, code: true, name: true } }\).then\(r => { console.log\(''Warehouses found:'', r.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\); prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''Error:'', e.message\); prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''./node_modules/.prisma/client''\); const prisma = new PrismaClient\(\); prisma.warehouse.findMany\({ take: 2 }\).then\(r => console.log\(''count:'', r.length, ''first:'', r[0] ? r[0].name : ''none''\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''FAIL:'', e.message\)\).finally\(\(\) => prisma.$disconnect\(\)\);")
